title: tephrosia collina
intro: Tephrosia collina, also known as the "Mountain Horsefly Tree", is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and woody branches. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly as a natural anti-inflammatory agent and antimicrobial agent, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia collina include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
